title: Marketinganalyst (m/w/d) — Data Driven Marketing Manager, Google Marketing Platform
matched_skills: Digital Tracking / Analytics — funnel & conversion analysis, data quality & tracking QA, behavioural analysis
Project management & multi-stakeholder coordination — Scrum, SAFe, HSBC PMO, Hapag-Lloyd cross-functional work
Technology-agnostic mindset — Power BI, Qlik Sense, Looker Studio, SAP Analytics
Data storytelling / translating business requirements — C-level insight narratives at HSBC
missing_skills: Google Marketing Platform (GMP) — no DV360, Campaign Manager, SA360, or GA4 admin experience
Fluent German — candidate is B1+; role explicitly requires fließend Deutsch (CRITICAL GAP)
4+ years dedicated MarTech platform build & deployment
key_requirements: Google Marketing Platform (GMP) expertise — Analytics and AdTech
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination (Marketing, IT, Data, Legal)
cv_highlights: Multi-tool analytics: Power BI, Qlik Sense, Looker Studio, SAP Analytics
C-level data storytelling and executive reporting
gaps: No Google Marketing Platform hands-on experience
No programmatic or SEA experience mentioned
German B1+ vs required fluent/fließend — most critical disqualifier
recommendation: Borderline match on analytics skills, but the German language requirement (fließend) is a hard filter. At B1+, candidate is likely below threshold. Not recommended unless candidate can demonstrate stronger German proficiency.
